entity.summary: Bermuda-licensed global centralized cryptocurrency exchange within HashKey Group, offering spot trading, futures trading, Launchpool, market access, APIs, and related digital-asset trading services for international users.
entity.notes: HashKey Global is modeled as a separate exchange entity from the existing Hong Kong HashKey Exchange record hei_ex_000093. HashKey Group presents its licensed global exchange and licensed Hong Kong exchange as separate business lines, while the Global platform states that it holds a Bermuda Monetary Authority Class F Digital Asset Business Licence and offers its own spot, futures, and Launchpool products.

evidence.title: HashKey Global official exchange website
evidence.notes: Current first-party exchange website exposes markets, spot trading, futures trading, Launchpool, and active trading entry points.

evidence.title: HashKey Global licensing and product information
evidence.notes: First-party platform information states that HashKey Global holds a Bermuda Monetary Authority Class F licence and separately describes spot, futures, and Launchpool products.

evidence.title: HashKey Group business lines
evidence.notes: HashKey Group's first-party business overview distinguishes a licensed virtual asset global exchange from a licensed virtual asset exchange in Hong Kong, supporting separate entity treatment.
